name: remove_tag_or_layer
description: Remove a custom tag or layer from the Unity project. Built-in tags (Untagged, Respawn, Finish, EditorOnly, MainCamera, Player, GameController) and built-in layers (Default, TransparentFX, Ignore Raycast, Water, UI) cannot be removed. When removing a tag, you can optionally untag all GameObjects that are currently using it.

tag.description: The name of the custom tag to remove, e.g. 'Enemy', 'Collectible'.

layer.description: The name of the custom layer to remove, e.g. 'Enemies', 'Ground'.

untag_game_objects.description: Optional (default false). When true and removing a tag, all GameObjects in the scene that use this tag will be set to 'Untagged' before the tag is removed. This prevents orphaned tag references.
